greeting: Hello, {{name}}! Welcome to your Travel Log.

subtitleStats: You've explored {{countries}} countries — {{percent}}% of the world.

noResultsMessage: No trips match your search. Try different terms.

ghostEmptyState.title: Your logbook is ready for takeoff
ghostEmptyState.description: Every explorer starts with a first route. Create your next trip and turn that destination into a story.
